fixture.iconPolicy: Every seeded exercise uses a matching iOS emoji selected through Marble's custom icon feature.

screenshots.headline: Every workout. Beautifully organized.
screenshots.supportingText: Log sets, runs, notes, rest, and effort in one private journal.

screenshots.headline: Log fast. Beat your best.
screenshots.supportingText: See the last set, live PR targets, and Save + Next without losing your flow.

screenshots.headline: See your strength grow.
screenshots.supportingText: Private, on-device trends turn your history into clear next steps.

screenshots.headline: Train with a plan.
screenshots.supportingText: Run a focused workout session while every set still lands in your Journal.

screenshots.headline: Every sprint has a target.
screenshots.supportingText: Set distance, reps, pace range, and rest—then score each rep against its saved goal.

screenshots.headline: Make every exercise yours.
screenshots.supportingText: Search and favorite your library, then choose an emoji or SF Symbol for every movement.

screenshots.headline: Your rhythm, at a glance.
screenshots.supportingText: Review training days, streaks, recovery, and progress from one calendar.

screenshots.headline: Your data stays yours.
screenshots.supportingText: Export or restore a portable JSON backup—no account, ads, or app tracking.
